name: Feature matrix

en.when_to_use: Use it to scan quickly how several products or options support a grouped set of capabilities, such as plan differences, platform compatibility, vendor coverage, or release-scope comparisons. If cells are mainly prices, long text, or ratings, use comparison-table instead. If users must edit, filter, or return a selection, use a data grid.
en.why_valuable: A Boolean feature table is valuable for visual scanning rather than text density. This template fixes a feature-major grouped structure with a sticky header and first column, and standardizes green check, red cross, and amber Partial semantics so a wide matrix preserves context while scrolling on narrow screens.

data_in.note: data is a nested, grouped feature-comparison matrix: columns defines options and stable ids; groups[].features defines rows; and features[].values stores true, false, or the string 'partial', keyed by column.id. Missing or unrecognized values display as an amber em dash. column.id should be unique; highlight:true should normally mark only one recommended option.

schema.title?: string -- matrix title; displays "Feature coverage" when omitted
schema.columns: {id:string,name:string,note?:string,highlight?:boolean}[] -- option columns; id is the values-map key, note is a short description, and highlight:true marks the recommended column
schema.groups: {label:string,features:{label:string,note?:string,values:Record<string,true|false|'partial'>}[]}[] -- grouped feature rows; each values key must match a columns[].id

spec.note: Height grows with groups and feature rows; after the table body reaches 640px it scrolls internally. The header and first column remain sticky in their respective directions. Narrow screens scroll horizontally, with no vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要快速扫视多个产品或方案对一组分组能力的支持情况时用它，适合套餐差异、平台兼容性、供应商覆盖和发布范围对照。若单元格主要是价格、长文本或评分，应改用 comparison-table；若要编辑、筛选或回传选择，应改用数据网格。
why_valuable: 布尔功能表的价值来自视觉扫描而非文字密度；本模板固定 feature-major 分组结构、粘性表头和首列，并统一 ✓ 绿色、✗ 红色、Partial 琥珀色语义，让宽矩阵在窄屏滚动时仍能保持上下文。

data_in.note: data 是嵌套分组的功能比较矩阵：columns 定义方案及稳定 id，groups[].features 定义行，features[].values 以 column.id 为键保存 true、false 或字符串 'partial'。未提供或无法识别的值显示为琥珀色 —。column.id 应唯一；highlight:true 通常只用于一个推荐方案。

schema.title?: string —— 矩阵标题；省略时显示 “Feature coverage”
schema.columns: {id:string,name:string,note?:string,highlight?:boolean}[] —— 方案列；id 是 values 映射键，note 为短说明，highlight:true 显示推荐列
schema.groups: {label:string,features:{label:string,note?:string,values:Record<string,true|false|'partial'>}[]}[] —— 分组功能行；values 的键必须对应 columns[].id

spec.note: 按分组与功能行增高，表体最高 640px 后内部滚动；表头和第一列在对应方向粘住。窄屏横向滚动，无 vh/百分比高度。

example._why: 三个可识别的工作区套餐、四个能力分组与混合支持状态，能同时验证推荐列、分组、三态 pill、粘性表头和首列。

uplink: none: 纯展示组件；所有悬停、滚动、原生链接或其他局部交互都只发生在自有 shadow 内，不向 AI 或宿主回传数据。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
